semantic.role: Mock Folder Summary for src in English

English.purpose: This document provides a placeholder summary for the src directory within the ArchSpine mirror system.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers and AI agents who need a high-level overview of the src folder's role and responsibilities in the project structure.
key_takeaways: The src directory is summarized with a mock role and responsibilities.
This document serves as a template or placeholder for future detailed documentation.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档为 ArchSpine 镜像系统中的 src 目录提供了一个占位摘要。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于需要了解项目中 src 文件夹角色和职责概览的开发者及 AI 代理。
key_takeaways: src 目录以模拟的角色和职责进行了总结。
本文档作为未来详细文档的模板或占位符。
